dining_and_culinary.name: Madera
dining_and_culinary.description: The resort’s premier dining destination featuring an open kitchen and an expansive outdoor terrace with sweeping views of the Santa Cruz Mountains.
dining_and_culinary.cuisine: Refined, regionally-inspired Northern California cuisine highlighting sustainably sourced ingredients from local purveyors.
dining_and_culinary.atmosphere: A handsome, sun-drenched indoor dining room with a massive wall of windows and multiple stone fireplaces.
dining_and_culinary.bespoke_options: Offers private indoor dining rooms and dedicated terraces for customized culinary gatherings or private events.

dining_and_culinary.name: Madera Bar
dining_and_culinary.description: A vibrant social hub located adjacent to the main restaurant, highly popular with both hotel guests and local Silicon Valley professionals.
dining_and_culinary.offerings: Handcrafted seasonal cocktails, premium fine wines, and a curated menu of sophisticated light bites.
dining_and_culinary.entertainment: Hosts 'Friday Nights @ Madera Bar,' featuring live jazz performances or professional DJs spinning classic vinyl on alternating weeks.
dining_and_culinary.vibe: Expands onto an outdoor terrace with fireside seating overlooking the mountains, ideal for networking or evening relaxation.

dining_and_culinary.name: Bici Coffee
dining_and_culinary.description: A cycling-inspired cafe nestled within the estate that caters to hotel guests, locals, and cycling enthusiasts passing through Sand Hill Road.
dining_and_culinary.menu: Artfully prepared espresso drinks, premium coffees, house-baked pastries, and light, nutritious morning snacks.
dining_and_culinary.concept: Designed as a social pit-stop reflecting the active, outdoor lifestyle of the surrounding Menlo Park community.

dining_and_culinary.name: Pool Bar & Grill & Dining Services
dining_and_culinary.description: Handles seasonal poolside dining, high-end afternoon tea collaborations, and standard in-room culinary services.
dining_and_culinary.pool_service: Delivers refreshing cocktails, fresh juices, and a summer-themed lunch menu directly to lounge chairs or private cabanas from late morning through late afternoon.
dining_and_culinary.afternoon_tea: An elegant, reimagined traditional tea experience featuring premium loose-leaf selections paired with artisan chocolate-infused pastries and savories (such as the Rosewood x Dandelion Chocolate partnership).
dining_and_culinary.in_room_dining: Provides full room service day and night, allowing guests to enjoy Madera-crafted dishes in the privacy of their rooms or private terraces.

wellness_spa_and_beauty.name: Asaya Spa
wellness_spa_and_beauty.description: A newly reimagined, state-of-the-art wellness facility focused on holistic vitality, tailored self-care rituals, and full-body rejuvenation.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.services: Advanced skin solutions and restorative body therapies utilizing premier luxury lines like QMS and EviDenS de Beauté.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.amenities: Premium steam rooms, traditional saunas, and a private outdoor whirlpool Jacuzzi for pre- or post-treatment relaxation.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.membership_options: Offers an exclusive Lifestyle Membership providing ongoing access to the facilities, tailored wellness paths, and spa privileges.

wellness_spa_and_beauty.name: Sand Hill Salon
wellness_spa_and_beauty.description: The premier on-site beauty destination providing professional hair styling and aesthetic care in an elegant environment.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.services: High-end haircuts, color treatments, blowouts, and specialized styling for weddings, galas, or corporate events.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.convenience: Positioned within the resort to serve guests needing professional grooming before upscale dinners or corporate meetings.

wellness_spa_and_beauty.name: Fitness Center & Motion Studio
wellness_spa_and_beauty.description: A comprehensive health club facility overlooking the resort’s lush courtyards, designed to cater to all fitness levels with a bright, welcoming environment.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.equipment: Cutting-edge cardio machines, strength-training equipment, and a complete selection of free weights.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.classes: Features a full calendar of group exercise classes, including specialized Saturday morning lawn yoga, pilates, and guided sound bath meditations.
wellness_spa_and_beauty.personal_training: Arranges one-on-one private instruction and tailored movement sessions upon request.

pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.name: Outdoor Heated Pool
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.description: The central oasis of the resort property, framed beautifully by a backdrop of olive trees and distant mountain ranges.
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.temperature_control: Fully heated to a comfortable degree year-round
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.hours: Open daily from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.policies: Safe for families and guests of all ages; county health codes strictly prohibit pets from entering the pool deck or hot tub areas.

pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.name: Private Poolside Cabanas
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.description: Elevated, secluded lounge spaces surrounding the main pool perimeter, perfect for guests seeking exclusivity and personalized comfort.
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.amenities: Outfitted with premium outdoor furnishings, privacy drapes, and dedicated butler service.
pools_and_outdoor_relaxation.refreshments: Guests can order handcrafted beverages and artisanal plates from the Pool Bar directly to their cabana for a seamless leisure day.

event_venues_and_gardens.name: Vista Lawn & Indoor Ballrooms
event_venues_and_gardens.description: A sophisticated collection of indoor and outdoor spaces engineered to host high-profile Silicon Valley gatherings, social galas, and weddings.

key_spaces.features: 16-foot vaulted ceilings and state-of-the-art presentation technology

event_venues_and_gardens.name: Manicured Gardens & Courtyards
event_venues_and_gardens.description: Arcaded gardens and inner courtyards defining the open-air, indoor-outdoor essence of the property with a tranquil backdrop of California flora.
event_venues_and_gardens.features: Flowering regional plants, winding stone pathways, and hidden seating alcoves perfect for reading or private reflection.
event_venues_and_gardens.recreation: Features a dedicated bocce ball court nestled within the grounds for casual afternoon entertainment.

personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.name: Mercedes-Benz Driving Experience & Transport Services
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.description: An exclusive partnership program providing high-end transport options to enhance Northern California travel.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.test_drives: Overnight guests can reserve and pilot a premium Mercedes-Benz vehicle directly through the front office to explore the scenic coastal ranges.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.town_car_service: Complimentary town car transportation provided within a five-mile radius of the hotel, ensuring hassle-free travel to local destinations.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.e_bikes: Complimentary electric bicycles available (subject to availability) for eco-friendly trail riding and local exploration.

personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.name: Rose Buds for Children
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.description: The resort's dedicated youth program ensuring younger guests receive a fully tailored and engaging vacation experience.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.activities: Curated outdoor adventures, hands-on arts and crafts, and kid-friendly culinary workshops.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.amenities: Specialized children's menus, cribs, child-proofing room items, and professional babysitting services arranged upon request through the concierge.

personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.name: Exclusive Recreation & Concierge Privileges
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.description: An elite concierge desk dedicated to orchestrating highly personalized off-site recreation and luxury services tailored to each individual guest's lifestyle.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.golf_access: Arranges exclusive playing privileges at the highly private, top-ranked Stanford University Golf Course.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.curated_excursions: Coordinates personalized falconry experiences, guided mountain hikes, local wine-tasting tours, and VIP access to historic nearby estates like Filoli.
personalized_programs_and_guest_amenitie.business_center: A fully functioning business hub offering high-speed wired and wireless internet, document services, and private meeting setups.
